function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system docs, then read finance lane AGENTS and validated matching records directly.
function.outcome_justification: The target line item appears in three invoices read. Two are pre-period (issued_on 2025-12-02 and 2025-12-30). One is within period (issued_on 2026-03-26) with line_eur 180, so total since the beginning of March 2026 is 180.
